unresolved_task_required_findings.summary: Copilot tool-off still registers tools while the proof only asserts empty metadata.
unresolved_task_required_findings.reason: This seam is still ambiguous at the real execution boundary and may require redefining the session-registration contract rather than applying one clearly safe inline fix.

unresolved_task_required_findings.summary: LM Studio temperature and maxTokens domains drift across discovery, validation, config defaults, and runtime execution.
unresolved_task_required_findings.reason: The repair spans multiple mirrored contract surfaces and changes an outward-facing flag domain, so it should be task-owned rather than treated as a small inline fix.

unresolved_task_required_findings.summary: Ordinary conversation writes can inject flow-owned metadata that later crosses into trusted resume state.
unresolved_task_required_findings.reason: This crosses an authority-sensitive persisted-state boundary and is not safe to treat as a low-risk inline cleanup.

unresolved_task_required_findings.summary: Copilot startup seeding has a time-of-check/time-of-use overwrite window for live runtime artifacts.
unresolved_task_required_findings.reason: The race-sensitive startup replay contract is not clearly low-risk, and the safe repair path is not certain enough to classify as minor.

resolved_minor_findings.summary: /chat/models now resolves LM Studio defaults from CODEINFO_LMSTUDIO_HOME so the configured provider-local default model is prioritized correctly.
resolved_minor_findings.proof: npm run test:summary:server:unit -- --file server/src/test/unit/chatModels.codex.test.ts -> passed (Focused route proof passed 28 tests with 0 failures.)

resolved_minor_findings.summary: Stop-lock mode now freezes model changes and the New conversation reset alongside the existing provider lock for selected conversations.
resolved_minor_findings.proof: npm run test:summary:client -- --file client/src/test/chatPage.stop.test.tsx -> passed (Focused stop-state proof passed 8 tests with 0 failures after targeting the selected-conversation stop-race seam.)

resolved_minor_findings.summary: The Bats shell-harness fixture binaries now keep their executable bit so PATH-based fixture invocation still works.
resolved_minor_findings.proof: npm run test:summary:shell -- --file scripts/test/bats/shell-harness.bats -> passed (Focused shell harness proof passed 2 tests with 0 failures.)

resolved_minor_findings.summary: POST /conversations now rejects malformed or provider-incompatible persisted flags before repo sanitization can normalize them into success.
resolved_minor_findings.proof: npm run test:summary:server:unit -- --file server/src/test/integration/conversations.create.test.ts -> passed (Focused create-route proof passed 4 tests with 0 failures.)

resolved_minor_findings.summary: Copilot seed bootstrap now fails clearly when the configured seed home exists but is not a directory, instead of pretending runtime initialization already succeeded.
resolved_minor_findings.proof: npm run test:summary:server:unit -- --file server/src/test/unit/copilotSeedBootstrap.test.ts -> passed (Focused Copilot seed bootstrap proof passed 7 tests with 0 failures.)

resolved_minor_findings.summary: Sidebar conversation selection now stays locked during the stop-lock startup race instead of retargeting the next send.
resolved_minor_findings.proof: npm run test:summary:client -- --file client/src/test/chatPage.stop.test.tsx -> passed (Focused client stop-state proof passed 8 tests with 0 failures.)

resolved_minor_findings.summary: Already-aborted LM Studio chat runs now short-circuit before loading history or opening the provider client.
resolved_minor_findings.proof: npm run test:summary:server:unit -- --file server/src/test/unit/lmstudio-provider-dispatch.test.ts -> passed (Focused LM Studio dispatch proof passed 5 tests with 0 failures.)

resolved_minor_findings.summary: Route-level defaults and capability warnings now use a provider-neutral validation label instead of the stale 'chat flag ignored' wording.
resolved_minor_findings.proof: npm run test:summary:server:unit -- --file server/src/test/unit/chat-route-warning-label.test.ts -> passed (Focused route warning-label proof passed 1 test with 0 failures.)

rejected_or_non_actionable_findings.summary: The Copilot boot-path test still uses timer-based polling instead of a stronger completion boundary.
rejected_or_non_actionable_findings.reason: This was reviewed as an optional simplification and is not worth fixing in the current story now that the story already completed.

rejected_or_non_actionable_findings.summary: The Copilot seed bootstrap unit-test title overclaims what its assertions actually prove.
rejected_or_non_actionable_findings.reason: This is proof-wording cleanup only and remains non-blocking optional simplification.

rejected_or_non_actionable_findings.summary: The chat models Cucumber step wording overclaims whole-body equality after response normalization.
rejected_or_non_actionable_findings.reason: This is a concrete proof-wording simplification, but it is still optional and non-blocking for the current story.

classification_notes: Fresh review-loop state was created after reset_review_cycle_state.md left no prior review-disposition-state.json to carry forward.

All 15 endorsed findings from the canonical findings artifact were classified exactly once; optional_simplification findings 13-15 were treated as rejected_or_non_actionable because they are non-blocking proof cleanups.
Findings 3, 8, 10, and 11 were classified conservatively as task-required because their execution, contract, authority, or replay semantics were not clearly safe for inline minor fixing.

Minor finding 1 was resolved inline on commit 5febcc1c2058d7f0eb65523709d20e197ed4dc30; the active plan and findings artifact were updated, and the review loop still routes to task-up because unresolved task-required findings remain.

Minor findings 2 and 4 were manually reconciled after their earlier result artifacts recorded malformed full SHAs; the active review state now points at the real fix commits 3603fa260d3545a83f786e2670c4892b3031c496 and b5f3f26db4dc0fdd2c834a7348de0cc5e27c1c80, and the plan plus findings artifact now record both inline resolutions.

Minor finding 5 was resolved inline on commit 483900b9ce1533adb265523cf621bb731573f08a; the active plan and findings artifact now record the route-validation repair, and the review loop still routes to task-up because unresolved task-required findings remain.

Minor finding 7 was resolved inline on commit d504c032dc98ebf9ac4b81f0c01526c627bd9909; the active plan and findings artifact now record the Copilot seed-home classification repair, and the review loop still routes to task-up because unresolved task-required findings remain.

Minor finding 12 was resolved inline on commit ee357745e5322f52a56f733bd1048e32019049ab; the active plan and findings artifact now record the sidebar stop-lock repair, and the review loop still routes to task-up because unresolved task-required findings remain.

Minor finding 6 was resolved inline on commit 5dc898d85954bc00cb2a4104eb551e790cf56135; the active plan and findings artifact now record the LM Studio abort short-circuit repair, and the review loop still routes to task-up because unresolved task-required findings remain.

Minor finding 9 was resolved inline on commit 450c0475c712147582175cc4df123c5d2a2213c9; the active plan and findings artifact now record the provider-neutral warning-label repair, and the review loop now routes only to task-up because no unresolved minor findings remain.
